Off Calendar Jul-22-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
James L. Dawson, of Gates Eisenhart Dawson, Tel. 408.288.8100, for plaintiffs;
Raymond C. Marshall, of Sheppard Mullin Richter & Hampton LLP, Tel. 415.434.9100, for defendants Wells Fargo & Kevin Harbour;
Steven H. Winick, of Sheppard Mullin Richter & Hampton LLP, Tel. 415.434.9100, for defendants Wells Fargo & Kevin Harbour.

Ruling: A R G U E D. The Court required parties to appear. Demurrer To 1st Amended Complaint is sustained without leave to amend. Order signed in open court. Judge Suzanne R. Bolanos; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Melanie Gheno, CSR No. 7489; Dept. 302. (302/SRB)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-21-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT KEVIN HARBOUR, WELLS FARGO CAPITAL FINANCE, LLC'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is continued to July 22, 2015, at 9:30 a.m. to be heard by Judge Bolanos because Judge Goldsmith recuses himself from this case. Judge Bolanos will be hearing the law and motion calendar on that date. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)
